title: Letters on the tapes on Liliths chamber
display_title: Letters on the tapes on Liliths chamber
wikitext:
[]: Letters on the tapes on Lilith's chamber             Quote Post by Shun » Sat Nov 28, 2020 1:17 pm From 1.0: Does anyone understand what's written on the tapes? Look like letters from the Hebrew alphabet ... Maybe: הלללאה hallelujah

[]: Re: Letters on the tapes on Lilith's chamber             Quote Post by Lacissal » Sun Nov 29, 2020 8:30 am Can handle Greek, Cyrillic, Arabic, basic Egyptian hieroglyphics, but somehow never could get to grips with Hebrew script lol The left hand writing appears to be - He- Yod-(dot)-Lamed ל • י ה ‎ Right hand Lamed- Lamed-dot-then a Dalet or a Resh ל ל‎ • ר The only bit I'd be confident of reading is the י ה as 'Yah' or short form of Yahweh/God as you said in Hallelujah and the three Lamedhs, though wacking up the contrast on my phone that He looks like a Chet Given the extreme faintness of the S and the L in the SEELE logo it's also possible there are illegible parts of the Hebrew text Other considerations might be that the letters where taken from some Kabbalistic source and have a numerical significance like the Gematria, or that they've transcribed some opf the letters wrong- or like the dots included part of the masorah, or ath the extreme end of things wrote a name from English to Hebrew but transcribed it from left to right instead of from right to left. Hebrew alphabet chart for reference https://images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/I/81A09Yq0-yL._AC_SL1500_.jpg

[]: Re: Letters on the tapes on Lilith's chamber             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Nov 30, 2020 10:25 am The set on the left, reading right to left, appears to be Lamed-Gimel-Resh-Nun, or perhaps Lamed-Gimel-Heh? It's really very hard to say. לִילִית is "Lilith" so the image on the right side is a reversed Lilith . So if the image on the left is reversed it should be... Vav-Resh/Dalet-Aleph/Gimel(?)-Lamed. I think?

Article: Letters on the tapes on Liliths chamber
 hard to say. לִילִית is "Lilith" so the image on the right side is a reversed Lilith . So if the image on the left is reversed it should be... Vav-Resh/Dalet-Aleph/Gimel(?)-Lamed. I think?
